title: Is Dijon-mustard Gluten Free? | BiteRight
description: Public gluten safety analysis for Dijon-mustard. See major risks, safer alternatives, and what to ask before ordering.
heading: Is Dijon-mustard gluten free?
intro: This public analysis report explains the biggest gluten risks in Dijon-mustard and how to order more safely.

verdict.summary: Dijon mustard is often gluten-free, but there is a risk of cross-contamination or the use of gluten-containing ingredients in some recipes. Always check labels and inquire about preparation methods.

disclaimer: This guidance is informational only. Always verify ingredients and preparation with the restaurant.

sections.title: Quick answer
sections.body: Dijon-mustard can vary by recipe, ingredients, and cross-contact controls in the kitchen.

sections.title: Common gluten risks
sections.body: Watch for hidden sources like soy sauce, malt flavoring, marinades, thickeners, and shared fryers.

sections.title: How BiteRight helps
sections.body: Scan menus and ingredient labels with BiteRight to get a localized gluten-risk breakdown in seconds.

risk: Wheat flour (used as a thickener in some recipes)

waiter_script.preview: Can you confirm if your dijon mustard is gluten-free and prepared in a gluten-free environment?

faq.question: Can BiteRight confirm if Dijon-mustard is gluten free?
faq.answer: BiteRight highlights likely gluten risks based on ingredients and preparation. Always confirm with the kitchen if you have coeliac disease.

faq.question: What should I ask a restaurant?
faq.answer: Ask about shared equipment, sauces, marinades, and whether the kitchen has a dedicated gluten-free prep area.
